title: chore(deps): update dependency rollup to v1.10.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| rollup | devDependencies | minor | [`1.9.0` -> `1.10.0`](https://diff.intrinsic.com/rollup/1.9.0/1.10.0) | [source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rollup/rollup</summary>

### [`v1.10.0`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1100)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.9.3...v1.10.0)

_2019-04-11_

##### Features

-   Improve generated code to polyfill `import.meta.url` ([#​2785](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2785))
-   Add plugin hook to configure handling of `import.meta` ([#​2785](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2785))
-   Improve generated code when accessing URLs of emitted assets ([#​2796](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2796))
-   Add plugin hook to configure the generated code when accessing URLs of emitted assets ([#​2796](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2796))

##### Bug Fixes

-   No longer resolve assets to their parent URL in some cases ([#​2796](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2796))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2785](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2785): Refactor handling of import.meta.url and add option to configure behaviour ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))
-   [#​2796](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2796): Improve and fix asset emission ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.9.3`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​193)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.9.2...v1.9.3)

_2019-04-10_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Simplify return expressions that are evaluated before the surrounding function is bound ([#​2803](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2803))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2803](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2803): Handle out-of-order binding of identifiers to improve tree-shaking ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.9.2`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​192)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.9.1...v1.9.2)

_2019-04-10_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Allowing replacing `output.file` with `output.dir` in the `outputOptions` hook ([#​2802](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2802))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2802](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2802): Observe modified output options in bundle.write ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.9.1`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​191)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.9.0...v1.9.1)

_2019-04-10_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Make sure inline comments in dynamic imports are preserved ([#​2797](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2797))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2797](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2797): Emit inline comments inside dynamic import ([@​manucorporat](https://togithub.com/manucorporat))

</details>
